summary: A re-shared Fox News BREAKING NEWS / FOX NEWS ALERT broadcast feed of President Trump signing an executive order on retirement accounts in the Oval Office, with a White House title-card border added. The audio is a continuous Trump speech and the frames are a static news feed of the signing. A speech/signing news clip, not a music-driven cinematic montage.
notable_text: Title card 'PROMISES MADE, PROMISES KEPT: EXPANDING RETIREMENT ACCESS'; Fox chyrons 'NOW: TRUMP SIGNS EO EXPANDING RETIREMENT SAVINGS', 'TRUMP: STOCK MARKET HAS SET 59 RECORDS ON MY WATCH'; on-screen 'TrumpIRA.gov'
